headline: A Look At Garmin (GRMN) Valuation As Shares Trade Near Analyst Fair Value Estimate
summary: Event context and recent stock performance Garmin (GRMN) has drawn fresh attention after a recent move in its share price, with the stock last closing at $256.89. That leaves it with a 1 day return of 0.14% and a past month gain of 10.01%. See our latest analysis for Garmin. Beyond the latest move, Garmin’s momentum has been strong, with a 90 day share price return of 21.47% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 37.59%, set against a 3 year total shareholder return of 175.01%.
